title: AA-Briefcase and AA-Briefcase-Lite official evaluation evidence

local_evidence.description: Clean text extracted from the official evaluation page
Raw HTML fetched from the official evaluation URL
Pinned Git snapshot containing the complete 198-path release tree; text, JSON, prompts, rubrics, task definitions, and LFS pointer records are preserved
Git object/path/size manifest for the pinned release
Official Hugging Face API metadata captured at retrieval

release_inventory.full_benchmark_claim_on_official_page: four private multi-week projects, thousands of input files, 91 tasks

acquisition_scope_and_limits: The Git snapshot was cloned without Git LFS support. Git-native files such as README, tasks, checks, prompts, grader JSON, summaries, Slack JSON, HTML, EML, and SRT are preserved as content; LFS-managed PDFs, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and MP4 files are preserved only as pointer records in this archive.
The four leaderboard scenarios remain private. AA-Briefcase-Lite is a public fifth scenario, is explicitly smaller and less challenging, and is not part of scored leaderboard results.
This is acquisition evidence only. No deep review, professional-validity claim, or claim that the public scenario represents the private benchmark is made.

verification.clean_text_inspection: Confirmed title, benchmark structure, independent task-run boundary, three check families, public-Lite caveat, and leaderboard sections were present
verification.release_inspection: Read README methodology, scenario overview, all four task records, and sampled rubric/check records; confirmed non-empty structured content and stated counts
